scenarios.description: generate(f) throws IllegalArgumentException when f is less than -5e9 (lower bound violation)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException with message containing "Value must be between -5000000000.0 and 5000000000.0"; no string returned

scenarios.description: generate(f) returns correct 14-char hex string when f equals -5e9 (lower boundary)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is new String of length 14 representing hex of ( (5e9 + (-5e9)) * 1e6 ) = 0 padded to 14 chars

scenarios.description: generate(f) throws IllegalArgumentException when f is greater than 5e9 (upper bound violation)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException with message containing "Value must be between -5000000000.0 and 5000000000.0"; no string returned

scenarios.description: generate(f) returns correct hex string when f equals 5e9 (upper boundary)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is new String of length 14 representing hex of ( (5e9 + 5e9) * 1e6 )

scenarios.description: generate(f) returns correct hex string for typical fractional value within range
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is new String of length 14 representing hex of ( (5e9 + 123.456789) * 1e6 ) with 6-decimal precision
